author: marcuswebb
description: Validator passes a line with an empty HTS field. It should reject and flag the line number.
title: Entry summary accepts blank HTS code without warning

author: priyaanand
description: Rounding happens per line instead of on the entry total. Penny drift shows up on entries over 30 lines.
title: Duty total off by one cent on multi-line entries

author: marcuswebb
description: Some legitimate MIDs are shorter than the regex expects. Loosen the length rule.
title: MID format check rejects valid short manufacturer IDs

author: priyaanand
description: Validator assumes one COO per line. Split shipments need per-quantity origin handling.
title: Handle entries with mixed country-of-origin on one line

author: brandonkim
description: The message just says invalid input. It should name the missing port code field.
title: Confusing error message when port code is missing

author: priyaanand
description: Lookup misses a match because the part number has a trailing space. Trim before query.
title: Part number with trailing space fails HTS lookup

author: marcuswebb
description: When a part maps to two valid HTS codes the script flags a false mismatch. Allow a known-alias list.
title: Cross-check flags correct classification as mismatch

author: priyaanand
description: Cache is not cleared after a schedule import, so old rates linger. Bust the cache on import.
title: Tariff rate lookup returns stale rate after quarterly update

author: marcuswebb
description: Lookups only handle the 8-digit subheading. Add the full 10-digit statistical suffix.
title: Support 10-digit statistical suffix in lookups

author: brandonkim
description: Machinery classifications under chapter 84 have no tests. Add cases for the tricky subheadings.
title: Add unit test coverage for chapter 84 edge cases

author: priyaanand
description: Export descriptions with commas inside quotes get split wrong. Use a real CSV parser, not a split.
title: CSV import drops rows with quoted commas in description

author: marcuswebb
description: The five-year window math is off at year boundaries. Exports from late prior year are skipped.
title: Drawback match misses exports dated in prior year

author: priyaanand
description: Import SKU and export SKU differ only in case but do not match. Normalize case before matching.
title: SKU match is case-sensitive and misses obvious pairs

author: marcuswebb
description: Partial drawback claims double-count the remaining quantity in the summary total.
title: Report totals do not reconcile when a line is partially claimed

author: marcuswebb
description: One missing element slips through. The bill-of-lading number check is skipped when blank.
title: ISF check passes filing with only nine of ten data elements

author: priyaanand
description: The 24-hours-before-lading deadline is computed in local time, not vessel time. Off by hours.
title: Timezone bug on filing deadline calculation

author: marcuswebb
description: No cross-check that consignee matches the importer on file. Add a consistency check.
title: Validate consignee number against importer of record

author: brandonkim
description: When the broker system rejects a filing we lose the reason. Capture and store the response.
title: Better logging when a filing is rejected upstream

author: priyaanand
description: Quarterly CSV from the source has a byte-order mark and the header parse fails. Strip the BOM.
title: Importer crashes on tariff schedule with BOM in header

author: marcuswebb
description: When a rate change overlaps the old one by a day, both show active. Close the prior rate on import.
title: Effective-date overlap leaves two active rates for one code

author: priyaanand
description: A malformed source row had a negative rate and it loaded. Reject rows that fail a sanity check.
title: Importer should reject negative or zero duty rates

author: marcuswebb
description: We want to preview what changes an import will make before it touches the tables.
title: Add a dry-run mode before committing a schedule import

author: brandonkim
description: Nobody can remember the column order the importer expects. Write it down in the README.
title: Document the expected CSV column order
